text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and process visual information from the world. Two key tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates and labels multiple objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, they are used in self-driving cars to recognize traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and avoid obstacles on the road. Beyond autonomous vehicles, computer vision is also used in medical imaging, security systems, and even in smartphone features like facial recognition. As this technology improves, it is becoming an essential part of modern life.
